class.name: SkaldParseResult
class.brief_description: The result of parsing a codex or module.
class.description: Returned by [method SkaldEngine.setup] and [method SkaldEngine.load]. Reports whether parsing succeeded and carries any errors or warnings encountered.

members.member: [code]true[/code] if parsing produced no errors (warnings do not clear this flag... they leave it [code]true[/code]).

Array of [Dictionary] entries, one per parse problem. Each has keys [code]message[/code] ([String]), [code]line[/code] ([int]), [code]column[/code] ([int]), [code]source[/code] ([String]), and [code]severity[/code] ([int]: [code]0[/code] = warning, [code]1[/code] = error).
